description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof, surrounded by a landscaped yard featuring several large, leafy trees. The structure is composed of multiple interconnected rectangular volumes, with a mix of open and enclosed spaces visible from above. The exterior walls are predominantly light-colored, with some sections featuring darker or accent panels. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, allowing for ample natural light and views of the surrounding greenery. The property includes a driveway and what appears to be a garage or carport area, as well as defined walkways leading to the main entrance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard with mature trees. The structure features clean lines, open spaces, and a mix of light and dark exterior panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a clear arrangement of trees and walkways leading to the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage/carport area and the asymmetrical placement of windows along the facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional windows, and the integration of trees close to the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a focus on the secondary entrance or side access, and more visible landscaping elements.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, direct walkway, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping and open access to the driveway.
